headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: Grok is an opinionated, real‑time assistant built around xAI’s models, live X data, and emerging agent features like voice agent builders and automations. Super is built specifically for people who want personal AI agents that actually operate computers — and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page compares what Grok is for today, where it’s heading, and why Super is the sharper alternative for durable computer‑use work.
